            <;>
            (try omega)
            <;>
            (try aesop)
          })
      simp [wignerMeasureDist, h₅]
      <;>
      (try aesop)
    -- Use the product measure property to get the law of the coordinate function
    have h₅ : HasLaw (fun ω : Index n → ℝ => ω ⟨(i, j), h⟩) (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n ⟨(i, j), h⟩) (Measure.pi (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n)) := by
      apply Measure.pi.hasLaw_prod
      <;> simp [h₄]
      <;>
      (try
        {
          aesop
        })
    rw [h₄] at h₅
    exact h₅
  exact h₂

have h₁ : HasLaw (fun ω ↦ (wignerMatrixMap n ω) i j) μ (WignerMeasure μ ν n) := by

have h₁ : (fun ω ↦ (wignerMatrixMap n ω) i j) = (fun ω ↦ ω (⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ : Index n)) := by

    (try {
      cases' le_or_lt i j with h' h' <;>

      (try { aesop })

  rw [h₁]
  have h₂ : HasLaw (fun ω : WignerSpace n ↦ ω (⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ : Index n)) μ (WignerMeasure μ ν n) := by
    have h₃ : HasLaw (fun ω : WignerSpace n ↦ ω (⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ : Index n)) (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n (⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ : Index n)) (WignerMeasure μ ν n) := by

        (try {

        })
        <;>

have h1 : (fun ω => (wignerMatrixMap n ω) i j) = (fun ω => wignerMatrixEntryFunction ω i j) := by
    funext ω
    simp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', Matrix.of_apply]
    <;>
    (try cases' lt_or_le i j with h₂ h₂ <;> simp_all [h₂, wignerMatrixEntryFunction, Fin.ext_iff]) <;>
    (try {
      have h₃ : i ≠ j := by
        intro h₄
        have h₅ : i = j := h₄
        have h₆ : ¬(i < j) := by simp_all [h₅]
        contradiction
      simp_all [h₃, wignerMatrixEntryFunction, Fin.ext_iff]
      <;>
      (try omega) <;>
      (try linarith)
    }) <;>
    (try {
      have h₃ : i = j := by simp_all [Fin.ext_iff]
      simp_all [h₃, wignerMatrixEntryFunction, Fin.ext_iff]
      <;>
      (try omega) <;>
      (try linarith)
    }) <;>
    (try simp_all [wignerMatrixEntryFunction, Fin.ext_iff]) <;>
    (try omega) <;>
    (try linarith)
  
  have h2 : HasLaw (fun ω => wignerMatrixEntryFunction ω i j) μ (WignerMeasure μ ν n) := by
    have h₂ : HasLaw (fun ω => wignerMatrixEntryFunction ω i j) μ (WignerMeasure μ ν n) := by
      have h₃ : i ≠ j := by
        intro h₄
        have h₅ : i = j := h₄
        have h₆ : ¬(i < j) := by
          simp_all [h₅]
          <;> omega
        contradiction
      have h₄ : (i : Fin n) < (j : Fin n) := by
        exact_mod_cast h
      have h₅ : (fun ω => wignerMatrixEntryFunction ω i j) = (fun ω => ω (⟨(i, j), by simpa using h₄.le⟩ : Index n)) := by
        funext ω
        rw [wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
        by_cases h₆ : i = j <;> by_cases h₇ : i < j <;> simp_all [h₆, h₇]
        <;>
        (try omega) <;>
        (try {
          have h₈ : j < i := by omega
          exfalso
          simp_all
        })
        <;>
        (try {
          exfalso
          simp_all
          <;> omega
        })
      rw [h₅]
      have h₆ : HasLaw (fun ω => ω (⟨(i, j), by simpa using h₄.le⟩ : Index n)) μ (WignerMeasure μ ν n) := by
        have h₇ : (⟨(i, j), by simpa using h₄.le⟩ : Index n) = ⟨(i, j), by simpa using h₄.le⟩ := rfl
        have h₈ : HasLaw (fun ω => ω (⟨(i, j), by simpa using h₄.le⟩ : Index n)) (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n ⟨(i, j), by simpa using h₄.le⟩) (WignerMeasure μ ν n) := by
          apply MeasureTheory.hasLaw_of measurable_π
          <;>
          simp_all [WignerMeasure]
          <;>
          aesop
        have h₉ : (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n ⟨(i, j), by simpa using h₄.le⟩) = μ := by
          simp [wignerMeasureDist]
          <;>
          (try simp_all [Fin.ext_iff, Index.mk.injEq]) <;>
          (try aesop) <;>
          (try {
            simp_all [Fin.ext_iff]
            <;>
            omega
          })
          <;>
          (try {
            exfalso
            simp_all [Fin.ext_iff]
            <;>
            omega
          })
        rw [h₉] at h₈
        exact h₈
      exact h₆
    exact h₂
  
  have h3 : HasLaw (fun ω ↦ (wignerMatrixMap n ω) i j) μ (WignerMeasure μ ν n) := by
    have h₃ : (fun ω ↦ (wignerMatrixMap n ω) i j) = (fun ω => wignerMatrixEntryFunction ω i j) := h1
    rw [h₃]
    exact h2
  
  exact h3

have h₁ : ∀ (ω : WignerSpace n), (wignerMatrixMap n ω) i j = ω ⟨(i, j), by

    <;>

    <;>

    have h₃ : HasLaw (fun ω : WignerSpace n ↦ ω ⟨(i, j), by exact h.le⟩) μ (WignerMeasure μ ν n) := by
      have h₄ : (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n ⟨(i, j), h.le⟩) = μ := by

        }) <;>

        }) <;>
        (try {
          omega
        })
      have h₅ : (WignerMeasure μ ν n) = (Measure.pi (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n)) := by
        rfl
      have h₆ : HasLaw (fun ω : WignerSpace n ↦ ω ⟨(i, j), by exact h.le⟩) (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n ⟨(i, j), h.le⟩) (WignerMeasure μ ν n) := by
        have h₇ : HasLaw (fun ω : WignerSpace n ↦ ω ⟨(i, j), by exact h.le⟩) (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n ⟨(i, j), h.le⟩) (Measure.pi (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n)) := by
          apply MeasureTheory.hasLaw_fst

        rw [h₅] at *

      have h₈ : (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n ⟨(i, j), h.le⟩) = μ := h₄
      rw [h₈] at h₆

    have h₉ : (fun ω : WignerSpace n ↦ (wignerMatrixMap n ω) i j) = (fun ω : WignerSpace n ↦ ω ⟨(i, j), by exact h.le⟩) := by

have h₁ : (fun ω : WignerSpace n => (wignerMatrixMap n ω) i j) = (fun ω : WignerSpace n => ω ⟨(i, j), by exact h.le⟩) := by
    ext ω
    simp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
    <;>
    (try
      {
        by_cases h_eq : i = j <;> simp_all [h_eq]
        <;>
        (try { contradiction })
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        by_cases h_lt : i < j <;> simp_all [h_lt]
        <;>
        (try { contradiction })
        <;>
        (try
          {
            have h_gt : j < i := by
              apply lt_of_le_of_ne
              apply le_of_not_gt
              intro h'
              simp_all
              <;> omega
              <;> simp_all [Fin.ext_iff]
              <;> omega
            simp_all [h_gt]
            <;>
            omega
          })
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        have h_lt : i < j := by assumption
        simp_all [h_lt]
        <;>
        omega
      })
  rw [h₁]
  have h₂ : HasLaw (fun ω : WignerSpace n => ω ⟨(i, j), by exact h.le⟩) (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n ⟨(i, j), by exact h.le⟩) (WignerMeasure μ ν n) := by
    apply hasLaw_fst
  have h₃ : wignerMeasureDist μ ν n ⟨(i, j), by exact h.le⟩ = μ := by
    dsimp [wignerMeasureDist]
    have h₄ : (⟨(i, j), by exact h.le⟩ : Index n).val.1 ≠ (⟨(i, j), by exact h.le⟩ : Index n).val.2 := by
      intro h₅
      simp [Fin.ext_iff] at h₅
      <;>
      (try { contradiction })
      <;>
      (try { omega })
    simp [h₄]
    <;>
    (try {
      simp_all [Index]
      <;>
      (try { contradiction })
    })
  rw [h₃] at h₂
  exact h₂

have h₁ : (fun ω ↦ (wignerMatrixMap n ω) i j) = (fun ω ↦ ω ⟨(i, j), h⟩) := by
    funext ω
    simp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
    <;>
    (try cases i <;> cases j <;> simp_all [Fin.ext_iff, Fin.val_succ]) <;>
    (try omega) <;>
    (try split_ifs <;> simp_all [le_of_lt]) <;>
    (try {
      have h₂ : i < j := h
      have h₃ : i ≠ j := by omega
      simp_all [h₃, h₂]
      <;> try omega
    }) <;>
    (try {
      have h₂ : i < j := h
      simp_all [h₂]
      <;> try omega
    })
    <;>
    (try {
      simp_all [not_lt]
      <;> omega
    })
    <;>
    (try {
      simp_all [le_of_not_gt]
      <;> omega
    })
  
  have h₂ : HasLaw (fun ω : WignerSpace n ↦ ω ⟨(i, j), h⟩) μ (WignerMeasure μ ν n) := by
    have h₃ : (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n ⟨(i, j), h⟩) = μ := by
      dsimp [wignerMeasureDist]
      have h₄ : (⟨(i, j), h⟩ : Index n).val.1 ≠ (⟨(i, j), h⟩ : Index n).val.2 := by
        intro h₅
        simp_all [Fin.ext_iff, Prod.ext_iff]
        <;> omega
      simp [h₄]
    have h₄ : HasLaw (fun ω : WignerSpace n ↦ ω ⟨(i, j), h⟩) (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n ⟨(i, j), h⟩) (WignerMeasure μ ν n) := by
      apply Measure.pi_coord_hasLaw
    rw [h₃] at h₄
    exact h₄
  
  rw [h₁]
  exact h₂

have h₁ : (fun ω ↦ (wignerMatrixMap n ω) i j) = (fun ω : WignerSpace n => ω ⟨(i, j), by exact le_of_lt h⟩) := by
    funext ω
    have h₁ : (wignerMatrixMap n ω) i j = (wignerMatrixEntryFunction ω i j) := rfl
    rw [h₁]
    have h₂ : wignerMatrixEntryFunction ω i j = ω ⟨(i, j), by exact le_of_lt h⟩ := by
      rw [wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
      have h₃ : ¬i = j := by
        intro h₄
        have h₅ : (i : ℕ) = (j : ℕ) := by exact Fin.ext_iff.mp h₄
        have h₆ : (i : ℕ) < (j : ℕ) := by exact_mod_cast h
        linarith
      have h₄ : ¬i < j → False := by
        intro h₅
        have h₆ : i < j := h
        exact h₅ h₆
      split_ifs <;> simp_all (config := {decide := true})
      <;> try { contradiction }
      <;> try { linarith }
      <;> try {
        exfalso
        have h₇ : (i : ℕ) < (j : ℕ) := by exact_mod_cast h
        have h₈ : (i : ℕ) > (j : ℕ) := by
          simp_all [Fin.ext_iff]
          <;> omega
        linarith
      }
    rw [h₂]
    <;> simp [wignerMatrixMap]
    <;> rfl
  
  have h₂ : HasLaw (fun ω : WignerSpace n => ω ⟨(i, j), by exact le_of_lt h⟩) μ (WignerMeasure μ ν n) := by
    have h₃ : i ≠ j := by
      intro h₄
      have h₅ : (i : ℕ) = (j : ℕ) := by exact Fin.ext_iff.mp h₄
      have h₆ : (i : ℕ) < (j : ℕ) := by exact_mod_cast h
      linarith
    have h₄ : (⟨(i, j), by exact le_of_lt h⟩ : Index n).val.1 ≠ (⟨(i, j), by exact le_of_lt h⟩ : Index n).val.2 := by
      simp_all [Index]
      <;> aesop
    have h₅ : wignerMeasureDist μ ν n ⟨(i, j), by exact le_of_lt h⟩ = μ := by
      simp [wignerMeasureDist]
      <;> simp_all [Index]
      <;> aesop
    have h₆ : HasLaw (fun ω : WignerSpace n => ω ⟨(i, j), by exact le_of_lt h⟩) (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n ⟨(i, j), by exact le_of_lt h⟩) (WignerMeasure μ ν n) := by
      apply MeasureTheory.hasLaw_pi
      <;> simp_all [wignerMeasureDist]
      <;> aesop
    rw [h₅] at h₆
    exact h₆
  
  have h₃ : HasLaw (fun ω ↦ (wignerMatrixMap n ω) i j) μ (WignerMeasure μ ν n) := by
    rw [h₁]
    exact h₂
  
  exact h₃

      apply MeasureTheory.hasLaw_pi
    have h₅ : wignerMeasureDist μ ν n ⟨(i, j), h⟩ = μ := by
      simp [wignerMeasureDist]
      <;>

        <;>
        (try { contradiction }) <;>
        (try { linarith }) <;>
